response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering (15+ years) and leadership in open-source projects, but lacks direct experience in AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy. His background in distributed systems, low-latency apps, and AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP) is promising, yet his resume does not highlight AI-specific achievements or entrepreneurial roles. The career gap raises questions about current availability and focus.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js, etc.)
Proven leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and developer tooling
Experience with high-scale systems (millions of requests/sec) and cloud-native technologies
concerns: No clear AI/ML product or platform experience; AI mentions are limited to agent infrastructure
Lack of entrepreneurial or startup experience in larger organizations (preferred qualification)
Career gap (Oct 2025–present) and no recent AI/cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Cloud/AI technology fluency and strategy alignment
